---
format: html
title: run_sjsdm_tuning_fold_candidates()
---

<html><head>

<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">

<script type="text/javascript">

const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};

function processMathHTML() {

    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');

    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }

    return;

}</script>

<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"

    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />

</head><body><div class="container"><main>



<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>run_sjsdm_tuning_fold_candidates</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>



<h2>Run sjSDM Tuning Candidates for One Fold</h2>



<h3>Description</h3>



<p>Prepares one fold once, then fits, predicts, and scores every regularization

candidate while preserving failures as compact status rows.

</p>





<h3>Usage</h3>



<pre><code class='language-R'>run_sjsdm_tuning_fold_candidates(

  data_candidates = NULL,

  list_fold_context = NULL,

  prepare_fold_function = NULL,

  fit_function = NULL,

  predict_function = NULL,

  seed = 900723L,

  epsilon = 1e-06

)

</code></pre>





<h3>Arguments</h3>



<table role = "presentation">

<tr><td><code id="data_candidates">data_candidates</code></td>

<td>

<p>Candidate table returned by [make_sjsdm_regularization_candidates()].</p>

</td></tr>

<tr><td><code id="list_fold_context">list_fold_context</code></td>

<td>

<p>Fold metadata returned by [make_sjsdm_tuning_fold_context()].</p>

</td></tr>

<tr><td><code id="prepare_fold_function">prepare_fold_function</code>, <code id="fit_function">fit_function</code>, <code id="predict_function">predict_function</code></td>

<td>

<p>Injectable fold preparation, fit, and prediction functions documented by

[run_sjsdm_tuning_candidates()].</p>

</td></tr>

<tr><td><code id="seed">seed</code></td>

<td>

<p>Non-negative base integer used to derive candidate fit seeds.</p>

</td></tr>

<tr><td><code id="epsilon">epsilon</code></td>

<td>

<p>Probability clipping tolerance passed to

[score_sjsdm_tuning_predictions()].</p>

</td></tr>

</table>





<h3>Value</h3>



<p>Compact candidate-by-fold tuning table with metrics and structured status.

</p>



</main>



</div>

</body></html>
